content: Has Sophie paid me?
No incoming payment from Sophie yet.
Have I sent money to Shofi?
I don't have a contact named Shofi, and none of your recent payments show that name. I can't confirm any payment to them.
Have I sent money to Sophie in the last month?

The transactions don't show names, only IBANs — so I can't confirm which ones went to Sophie specifically. The two pizza payments I mentioned earlier were to the same IBAN. Do you know Sophie's IBAN, or would you like me to look her up in your contacts?
Can you tell us about how much we spent on groceries last month?

The spending data groups everything under one account, so I can't pull out a grocery total specifically. You spent just over one thousand and forty-six euros in the last thirty days across fifty-three transactions, but I'm unable to break out groceries from that.
Tell me just the balance amount, nothing else. Be extremely brief, just the number in words.
Nine hundred and fifty-three euros and fifty-eight cents.
Tell me just the balance amount, nothing else. Be extremely brief, just the number in words.
Nine hundred and fifty-three euros and fifty-eight cents.
Tell me just the balance amount, nothing else. Be extremely brief, just the number in words.
Nine hundred and fifty-three euros and fifty-eight cents.
Read me my IBAN. Just the IBAN, nothing else. Read it in plain letters and digits, not the NATO phonetic alphabet.
Tell me just the balance amount, nothing else. Be extremely brief, just the number in words.
Nine hundred and fifty-three euros and fifty-eight cents.
Hi, can you list all my grocery spendings from last week?
I don't have a way to filter transactions by category like groceries directly. Would you like me to go through your recent card transactions one by one so you can identify the grocery ones?
